ul.li: Memory Alignment: __attribute__((aligned(64))) is applied to ensure the start of the inode aligns with the L1 cache line hardware prefetcher.
Cold Path Optimization: Direct pointers and frequently accessed metadata (UID/Size) are packed within the first 64 bytes to minimize cache misses during recursive directory traversals.

Capacity Metrics:
Direct Zone: 48 KiB
Single Indirect: 2 MiB (assuming 4KiB blocks, 512 64-bit pointers)
Double Indirect: 1 GiB
Triple Indirect: 512 GiB
Padding: The 3908 bytes of padding ensure the struct perfectly fills a standard x86_64 4KB page, preventing internal fragmentation in the slab allocator.
